comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Addressed the review correctness gaps in current branch: (1) /autoresearch start/resume now create+attach fresh child sessions via command-owned switching/newSession and apply pinned execution profile in child; autoresearch_done now clears child ownership; pause/stop reject pending runs. (2) Ralph clean now scopes to ralph loops only via LoopEngine.cleanLoops(cwd, all, "ralph"); /autoresearch clean scopes to autoresearch. (3) scope.root absolute paths now fail-fast during contract normalization. (4) keep finalization now validates changed paths against phase snapshot scope.paths/off_limits and rejects out-of-scope/off-limits changes before commit. (5) limits.max_iterations now persists in canonical autoresearch state and autoresearch_run blocks once runCount reaches the limit; phase-start execution profile pinning is captured at /autoresearch start/resume. Added regression tests in loop-engine-service + task-contract tests and reran gate (typecheck/lint/test pass; lint warnings unchanged).

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Completed follow-up fixes from iterative review: child-session rollback now covers post-create validation/apply/attach failures, removes failed child session files, and hard-fails if switch-back to controller fails; keep finalization excludes ignored paths from staging while still validating/cleaning ignored artifacts under scope. Added tests for execution-profile phase pinning, clean scoping by workflow kind, and blocked manual-resolution state preservation notes, plus absolute scope.root (POSIX + Windows-style) rejection. Review agent final pass reported no remaining P0-P3 findings.
